scripts.lint: bun run format && oxlint -c oxlint.json --import-plugin --report-unused-disable-directives src test
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run format:check && oxlint -c oxlint.json --import-plugin --report-unused-disable-directives src test && bun test
scripts.diagnostics: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun test
